description_long: This food truck features a compact, rectangular metal cart with two large blue umbrellas providing shade on either side. The front panel displays a colorful sign with a hot dog graphic and the word 'Yum!' in bright yellow, alongside a menu board. The top of the cart is lined with an array of colorful beverage cans or bottles, and there are condiment dispensers and a cash register on the counter. The cart is supported by wheels for mobility and has storage compartments visible on the side. The overall design is practical and inviting, suitable for serving food and drinks in busy urban environments.
description: A compact metal food cart with blue umbrellas, colorful signage, and a row of beverage cans on top, designed for street food service.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hot dog sign, 'Yum!' text, beverage display, condiment dispensers, and both blue umbrellas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cart, the arrangement of umbrellas, and the side profile of the beverage display.
description_view_2: Rear view showing storage compartments, the back of the counter, and the umbrellas' support poles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the umbrellas and the side of the cart, partially obscuring the beverage display.
attribute_signage: Hot dog graphic with 'Yum!' text and a menu board on the front panel.
